title: caladenia remota subsp. remota
intro: Caladenia remota subsp. remota, also known as the distant spider orchid, is a type of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The distant spider orchid has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Caladenia remota subsp. remota is often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and the need for further research.
